name: PER_WORK_INCIDENTS
description: This table stores details of incidents at work, dates, place, types

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person for whom the row is recorded

columns.Name: INCIDENT_REFERENCE
columns.Comments: Unique reference code for the work incident

columns.Name: INCIDENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of incident.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_TIME
columns.Comments: Time of incident.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment under which incident happened, foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M

columns.Name: LOCATION
columns.Comments: Location of the incident (not related to HR locations)

columns.Name: AT_WORK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether incident occurred at work or en route to work.

columns.Name: LAST_WORK_DATE
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not Used anymore.

columns.Name: LAST_WORK_TIME
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not Used anymore.

columns.Name: REPORT_DATE
columns.Comments: Date incident was reported.

columns.Name: REPORT_TIME
columns.Comments: Time incident was reported.

columns.Name: REPORT_METHOD
columns.Comments: Method by which the incident was reported.

columns.Name: PERSON_REPORTED_BY
columns.Comments: Person who reported the incident. Foreign key to PER_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PERSON_REPORTED_TO
columns.Comments: Details of person or authority that the incident was reported to.

columns.Name: WITNESS_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Name and contact information of witness(es) to the incident.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Long text description of the incident

columns.Name: INJURY_TYPE
columns.Comments: The category of injury that was incurred.

columns.Name: DISEASE_TYPE
columns.Comments: The category of disease diagnosed

columns.Name: HAZARD_TYPE
columns.Comments: The category of hazard (object or substance) involved

columns.Name: BODY_PART
columns.Comments: Description of body part involved and how affected.

columns.Name: TREATMENT_RECEIVED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether medical treatment administered.

columns.Name: HOSPITAL_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Details of hospitalisation.

columns.Name: DOCTOR_ID
columns.Comments: Id of doctor treating the injury or disease

columns.Name: NEXT_OF_KIN_ID
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not Used anymore.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the absence that was recorded, foreign key to PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCES

columns.Name: COMPENSATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of compensation award.

columns.Name: COMPENSATION_CURRENCY
columns.Comments: Currency in which compensation was awarded.

columns.Name: COMPENSATION_AMOUNT
columns.Comments: Amount of compensation.

columns.Name: REMEDIAL_HS_ACTION
columns.Comments: Details of health and safely action required following the incident.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_HSREP_ID
columns.Comments: Health and Safety representative notified of incident. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_HSREP_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Health and Safety representative was notified.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_UREP_ID
columns.Comments: Person belonging to representative body notified of incident.  Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_UREP_DATE
columns.Comments: Date representative body was notified of incident.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Obsolete. Not Used anymore.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ORG_NOTIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date the organization was notified of the work incident.

columns.Name: DOCTOR_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of doctor treating the injury or disease

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_REP_ID
columns.Comments: Person belonging to representative body notified of incident.  Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_REP_DATE
columns.Comments: Date representative body was notified of incident.

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_REP_ORG_ID
columns.Comments: Representative Body that has been notified. Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: RELATED_INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Work incident to which this record relates. Foreign key to PER_WORK_INCIDENTS

columns.Name: OVER_TIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether disease or condition occurred gradually

columns.Name: ABSENCE_EXISTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if an absence was recorded for the work incident

columns.Name: EMERGENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Indicates if the case was an emergency

columns.Name: PRIVACY_ISSUE
columns.Comments: Whether this incident is a privacy matter

columns.Name: OBJECTS_INVOLVED
columns.Comments: Objects or substances involved

columns.Name: ACTIVITY_AT_TIME_OF_WORK
columns.Comments: Activity at time of work

columns.Name: HOSPITAL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Address of the Hospital

columns.Name: DAYS_RESTRICTED_WORK
columns.Comments: Number of days where work was restricted

columns.Name: HOSPITALIZED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if the person was hospitalized

columns.Name: DATE_OF_DEATH
columns.Comments: Denotes the date of death.

columns.Name: DAYS_AWAY_FROM_WORK
columns.Comments: Number of days away from work

columns.Name: WORK_START_TIME
columns.Comments: Time employee began work

columns.Name: REPORTING_PERSON_PHONE
columns.Comments: Phone number of reporting person

columns.Name: REPORTING_PERSON_TITLE
columns.Comments: Job title of person reporting the incident

columns.Name: REPORT_COMPLETED_BY
columns.Comments: Name of the person reporting
